## Commands

<a id="command-goto_house"></a>

### `cmd.goto_house(player)`

Goes to the player's house.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/map.ts:270`

```ts
cmd.goto_house(player?: string): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `player` | `string` | no |  | Optional player name. Defaults to the current player. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.goto_house()
```

```js
cmd.goto_house("Artix")
```

<a id="command-goto_player"></a>

### `cmd.goto_player(player)`

Goes to another player.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/map.ts:254`

```ts
cmd.goto_player(player: string): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `player` | `string` | yes |  | Player name. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.goto_player("Artix")
```

<a id="command-join_map"></a>

### `cmd.join_map(map, cell, pad)`

Joins a map, optionally targeting a cell and pad.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/map.ts:198`

```ts
cmd.join_map(map: string, cell: string = DEFAULT_JOIN_CELL, pad: string = DEFAULT_PAD): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `map` | `string` | yes |  | Map name. |
| `cell` | `string` | no | `DEFAULT_JOIN_CELL` | Optional cell name. |
| `pad` | `string` | no | `DEFAULT_PAD` | Optional pad name. |

**Aliases**

`cmd.join`

**Examples**

```js
cmd.join_map("battleon", "Enter", "Spawn")
```

```js
cmd.join("battleon")
```

<a id="command-move_to_cell"></a>

### `cmd.move_to_cell(cell, pad)`

Moves the player to a cell and optional pad.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/map.ts:223`

```ts
cmd.move_to_cell(cell: string, pad: string = DEFAULT_PAD): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cell` | `string` | yes |  | Cell name. |
| `pad` | `string` | no | `DEFAULT_PAD` | Optional pad name. |

**Aliases**

`cmd.jump`, `cmd.jump_to_cell`

**Examples**

```js
cmd.move_to_cell("Boss", "Left")
```

```js
cmd.jump_to_cell("Enter")
```

<a id="command-set_spawnpoint"></a>

### `cmd.set_spawnpoint(cell, pad)`

Sets the spawn point.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/map.ts:288`

```ts
cmd.set_spawnpoint(cell?: string, pad?: string): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `cell` | `string` | no |  | Optional cell name. |
| `pad` | `string` | no |  | Optional pad name. |

**Aliases**

`cmd.set_spawn`

**Examples**

```js
cmd.set_spawnpoint("Boss", "Left")
```

```js
cmd.set_spawn("Enter", "Spawn")
```

<a id="command-walk_to"></a>

### `cmd.walk_to(x, y)`

Walks to a point on the map.

**Source:** `app/src/renderer/game/scripting/Commands/map.ts:239`

```ts
cmd.walk_to(x: number, y: number): void
```

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `x` | `number` | yes |  | X coordinate. |
| `y` | `number` | yes |  | Y coordinate. |

**Examples**

```js
cmd.walk_to(450, 320)
```
